title: Bat Removal & Exclusion in Seaford, NY | $900 – $2,500
metaDescription: Professional bat removal and exclusion services in Seaford, Long Island. Humane, safe bat control for homes and businesses. Licensed experts. Call today for a free estimate!
intro: Seaford homeowners facing bat infestations need fast, humane solutions to protect their families and property. Best Pest Control NYC offers comprehensive bat removal and exclusion services throughout Seaford, ensuring bats are safely removed and prevented from returning. Our licensed technicians use proven methods to secure your home while complying with all wildlife protection regulations.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings years of specialized bat control experience to Seaford residents, combining humane removal techniques with permanent exclusion solutions. Our team is fully licensed, insured, and trained in the latest bat control methods, ensuring your home remains bat-free with warranties that give you peace of mind.
localContext: Seaford's tree-lined neighborhoods and mix of colonial, ranch, and Cape Cod-style homes provide ideal entry points for bats seeking shelter in attics and eaves. From properties near Seaford Harbor to homes around Tackapausha Preserve, our team understands the unique architectural features of Long Island homes that make them vulnerable to bat intrusions.

faqs.question: How much does bat removal cost in Seaford?
faqs.answer: Bat removal and exclusion services in Seaford typically range from $900 to $2,500, depending on the size of the colony, number of entry points, and the extent of exclusion work needed. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Is bat removal legal in New York?
faqs.answer: Yes, but bat removal must be done humanely and during specific times of the year. In New York, bats cannot be excluded during maternity season (approximately May 1 to August 15) when flightless young are present. Our team follows all state and federal wildlife protection laws to ensure legal, ethical bat removal.

faqs.question: How do I know if I have bats in my Seaford home?
faqs.answer: Common signs include squeaking or scratching sounds in your attic at dusk or dawn, dark stains near entry points, accumulation of bat droppings (guano) in attics or outside walls, and seeing bats flying around your home at sunset. If you notice any of these signs, contact us immediately for an inspection.

faqs.question: What does the bat exclusion process involve?
faqs.answer: Our bat exclusion process includes a thorough inspection to identify all entry points, installation of one-way exclusion devices that allow bats to leave but not return, sealing all secondary entry points, cleanup of contaminated areas, and follow-up visits to ensure complete exclusion. We also provide attic restoration services if needed to repair damage caused by bat guano.
